mnemonics: M.E.S.S. - Microservices, Event-Driven, Serverless, Service Mesh
keyPoints: Microservices architecture breaks applications into small, independent services
Event-Driven Architecture (EDA) uses events to trigger and communicate between decoupled services
Serverless computing (FaaS) executes code in response to events without managing servers
commonMistakes: Assuming serverless means no servers (it means no server management)
Designing microservices that are too coupled, defeating the purpose of independence
Underestimating the complexity of managing communication and data consistency in distributed systems
